calendar.matters:
MERITS OF PETITIONER'S CONSOLIDATED WRIT CLAIMS
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Andrew Bassak, Esq. and Ellis Raskin, Esq. for Petitioner 1900 Bryant Street Investors, LLC
Brian Crossman, Esq. and Peter Miljanick, Esq. for Respondent City and County of San Francisco

Parties confirm that they have read the tentative ruling.

Petitioner offers proof and argument as to the letters of determination by the Zoning Administrator.
Respondent responds to Petitioner's argument to classification of use and provides proof.

The matter is discussed and argued at length.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner's Consolidated Petitions for Writ of Mandate are DENIED.

Proposed order signed and filed this day.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by Michelle Archuletta; CSR#11028; (510)909-1121; michellecsr@comcast.net. (D501)

MERITS OF PETITIONER'S CONSOLIDATED WRIT CLAIMS
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Continued To Oct-20-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

MERITS OF PETITIONER'S CONSOLIDATED WRIT CLAIMS is continued to October 20, 2025, on Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MERITS OF PETITIONER'S CONSOLIDATED WRIT CLAIMS
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Continued To Sep-30-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: HEARING RE: PETITIONER'S CONSOLIDATED WRIT CLAIMS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: CONTINUED to September 30, 2025 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/GLW)
